title: Eva voice cast appearences
wikitext:
[]: Eva voice cast appearences             Quote Post by Kiel » Sun Sep 26, 2004 3:23 pm Ohayo! I'm just wondering if anybody knows which anime conventions that Matt Greenfield, ADV and the Eva cast have attended or are planning to attend. I just want to know where they'll be in the future, that way I can send invitations to Anime North/CNAnime. Canadian cons get very few of the bigger, American VA's, so I'm hoping that'll change.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Sep 26, 2004 7:47 pm These are in sequential order. If you don't know who these people are, find out yourself by visiting via the URL links. Tiffany Grant is often accompanied by husband Matt Greenfield and vice versa. Ani-Magic http://www.ani-magic.net/ Tiffany Grant & Matt Greenfield Anime Reactor http://www.animereactor.org/ Tensai Okamura & Keith Burgess Nekocon http://www.nekocon.org/ Greg Ayres & Tiffany Grant Anime USA http://www.animeusa.org/ Greg Ayres Sugoicon http://www.sugoicon.org/ Greg Ayres Numa Rei-No Con http://www.numareinocon.com/ Keith Burgess & Greg Ayres Ohayocon http://www.ohayocon.com/ Greg Ayres & Tiffany Grant Anime Boston http://www.animeboston.com/ Tiffant Grant & Carl Horn FanimeCon http://www.fanime.com/ Hiroyuki Yamaga I will also be in attendance at Nekocon and Katsucon, if you are so inclined. http://www.nekocon.com/ http://www.katsucon.com/ If you've ever been interested in attending a convention, please refer to the following list. Its about 6 months outdated, but its a good reference. http://www.evamonkey.com/convention.htm

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Sun Sep 26, 2004 9:59 pm Hey monkey or Aron can you send me or find out when and where a anime convention will be near Phonix, AZ ive been looking like a mad man but cant find crap! thanks

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Sep 26, 2004 10:40 pm Dark FireStar wrote: Hey monkey or Aron can you send me or find out when and where a anime convention will be near Phonix, AZ ive been looking like a mad man but cant find crap! thanks

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Fri Oct 01, 2004 6:33 pm Oct. 1 - Ani-Magic. Well, the only thing on the list that might have been relevant to me is out the window. Anybody go?

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Mon Oct 11, 2004 4:15 pm im going to wait a loonnng time then :cry: oh well its worth the wait lol
